parameters.query:
SELECT
    title_cn,
    summary,
    points,
    sentiment,
    source_type,
    discussion_link,
    created_at
FROM view_dashboard_news
WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  AND title_cn IS NOT NULL
  AND BTRIM(title_cn) <> ''
  AND LOWER(title_cn) <> 'null'
  AND summary IS NOT NULL
  AND BTRIM(summary) <> ''
  AND LOWER(summary) <> 'null'
  AND summary NOT ILIKE '%Analysis failed due to content access issues%'
  AND LENGTH(summary) > 50
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 240;

SELECT
    email,
    name,
    COALESCE(source_preferences, '[]'::jsonb) AS source_preferences,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(timezone, ''), 'Asia/Shanghai') AS timezone,
    COALESCE(frequency, 'daily') AS frequency
FROM subscribers
WHERE is_active = TRUE
  AND COALESCE(frequency, 'daily') = 'daily'
  AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM (NOW() AT TIME ZONE COALESCE(NULLIF(timezone, ''), 'Asia/Shanghai'))) = 8;
